promises.promise_text: Allocate 25% of the Member of Parliament Local Area Development Scheme (MPLAD) funds based on direct recommendations and demands of Residents' Welfare Associations (RWAs) in the constituency.
promises.impact_summary: As of mid-2026, Swaraj has held multiple consultation sessions with various RWAs in New Delhi, and initial tranches of the MPLAD funds have been approved for local municipal and civic upgrades suggested by these bodies.

evidence.title: BJP candidate Bansuri Swaraj promises to spend 25% of MPLAD fund on suggestions of RWAs
evidence.summary: Reports on Bansuri Swaraj's campaign promise to allocate one-fourth of her MPLAD funds based on suggestions from Resident Welfare Associations (RWAs).

promises.promise_text: Establish a dedicated startup hub in the New Delhi Lok Sabha constituency to foster entrepreneurship and create employment opportunities for local youth and women.
promises.impact_summary: Initial planning discussions and coordination with the Ministry of Commerce and Industry have been initiated as of 2026, with the aim to select a venue and establish mentorship frameworks.

evidence.title: Lok Sabha Elections: Bansuri Swaraj promises startup hub in New Delhi constituency
evidence.summary: Covers Swaraj's announcement of her election manifesto for the New Delhi constituency, highlighting the creation of a startup hub for youth and women.

promises.promise_text: Collaborate with the Delhi Police to deploy advanced drone surveillance systems in vulnerable areas of New Delhi to enhance women's safety and curb street crime.
promises.impact_summary: As of 2026, Delhi Police has expanded its drone patrolling initiatives in several pockets of the New Delhi district following requests and coordination by the MP.

evidence.title: Bansuri Swaraj advocates for drone technology to bolster women's security in Delhi
evidence.summary: Details Swaraj's vision for leveraging technology like drone-based patrolling to monitor dark spots and improve women's safety in the national capital.

promises.promise_text: Advocate for and execute registrations for the Ayushman Bharat Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PM-JAY) health insurance scheme for Delhi residents, especially targeting elderly citizens and slum dwellers.
promises.impact_summary: Swaraj has organized signature campaigns and registration facilitation drives across slum clusters like Bhawar Singh Camp. However, the full implementation remains entangled in political disputes between the Union government and the Delhi state government.

evidence.title: Ayushman Bharat signature campaign launched by BJP MPs in Delhi slums
evidence.summary: Covers the signature and awareness campaign conducted by New Delhi MP Bansuri Swaraj and others in JJ clusters like Vasant Vihar to demand Delhi government assent for Ayushman Bharat.

promises.promise_text: Demand systemic upgrades to resolve the drinking water crisis in New Delhi, targeting illegal water distribution and upgrading pipelines.
promises.impact_summary: Swaraj has led multiple protests, filed formal complaints regarding leakage in Delhi Jal Board pipelines, and met with the Jal Shakti Ministry to seek solutions for groundwater recharge and supply lines.

evidence.title: New Delhi MP Bansuri Swaraj protests against DJB over water shortage in various pockets
evidence.summary: Reports on protests led by Swaraj highlighting the 'artificial' water crisis due to leakage and poor maintenance by the state water board.

promises.promise_text: Enhance sanitation, tree cover, and civic amenities across unregulated slum areas (JJ clusters) in the New Delhi constituency.
promises.impact_summary: Cleanliness drives ('Jhuggi Basti Safai Abhiyan') and community dialogues ('Ratri Pravas Samvad Abhiyaan') have been conducted in Naraina and GK camps. Specific sanitation upgrades and mobile toilet services are being deployed as of 2026.

evidence.title: BJP leaders spend night in Delhi slums under dialogue initiative
evidence.summary: Reports on New Delhi MP Bansuri Swaraj staying in slum clusters to document local grievances and launch targeted sanitation and water facility improvements.

promises.promise_text: Construct and operationalize a state-of-the-art urban public transport ropeway system connecting Varanasi Cantonment Railway Station to Godowlia Chowk to ease traffic congestion.
promises.impact_summary: As of mid-2026, the construction of India's first urban ropeway is in its final stages. Station buildings and cable guides are complete, and trial safety runs are currently underway with operations expected by the end of 2026.

evidence.title: Varanasi Ropeway Project: Trial runs underway on India's first urban ropeway transport
evidence.summary: Official release confirming progress and technical trial run details for the Varanasi ropeway corridor.

promises.promise_text: Build a modern International Cricket Stadium in Ganjari, Varanasi, featuring Lord Shiva-inspired architecture and a seating capacity of over 30,000.
promises.impact_summary: As of June 2026, construction is roughly 92% complete. Structural work on the stands, damaru-shaped media center, and trident-shaped floodlights has been completed, with finishing touches underway.

evidence.title: PM Modi lays foundation stone of International Cricket Stadium in Varanasi
evidence.summary: Details of the foundation laying ceremony of the Shiva-themed stadium by PM Modi and its planned technical specifications.

promises.promise_text: Modernize and redevelop the Sigra Sports Stadium into a high-tech National Centre of Excellence (NCOE) in collaboration with the Sports Authority of India (SAI).
promises.impact_summary: The project has been completed. The UP Cabinet formally handed over the operation and maintenance of the newly redeveloped indoor/combat sports facility to SAI in late 2025, and athletic training is active in 2026.

evidence.title: UP Cabinet hands over redeveloped Sigra Stadium to Sports Authority of India
evidence.summary: Cabinet decision details on operationalizing the redeveloped sports stadium as a National Centre of Excellence under SAI supervision.

promises.promise_text: Construct a 55 MLD Sewage Treatment Plant (STP) for the Assi-BHU area under the Namami Gange Programme to prevent untreated sewage outfalls into the Ganga.
promises.impact_summary: The 55 MLD STP serving the Assi-BHU basin has been commissioned and is fully operational. It includes a 750-kW solar system for energy sustainability, stopping the discharge of raw municipal sewage into the river.

evidence.title: Namami Gange Project: 55 MLD Assi-BHU STP commissioned to clean river Ganga in Varanasi
evidence.summary: Press release stating the completion, testing, and operational status of the solar-powered 55 MLD STP under Namami Gange.

promises.promise_text: Expand the Lal Bahadur Shastri International Airport at Babatpur to increase passenger capacity to 9.9 MPPA, involving runway extension and a highway underpass tunnel.
promises.impact_summary: Following Union Cabinet approval in June 2024 with an outlay of ₹2,869.65 crore, active construction of the runway extension and new terminal started in 2025 and continues in 2026 with occasional night work blocks.

evidence.title: Cabinet approves proposal for acquisition of land and expansion of Lal Bahadur Shastri International Airport, Varanasi
evidence.summary: Union Cabinet approval details, cost figures, and development layout for the Varanasi Airport expansion project.

promises.promise_text: Redevelop the historic Kashi Railway Station into a modern Inter-Model Station with enhanced passenger facilities and better river/road connectivity.
promises.impact_summary: As of June 2026, land acquisition, demolition of old residential quarters, and encroachment clearance are complete. Construction of the new terminal complexes is underway.

evidence.title: Kashi Railway Station modernization and Inter-Model hub blueprint finalized
evidence.summary: Written reply by the Ministry of Railways in Lok Sabha detailing the Kashi Inter-Model Station masterplan, land allocation, and funding status.

work_vs_impact.methodology_ref: Impact proxy weighted from execution status bands and confidence levels

promises.promise_text: Secure complete housing rehabilitation, central grants, and livelihood support for the survivors of the devastating 2024 landslides in Mundakkai and Chooralmala.
promises.impact_summary: Vadra has repeatedly lobbied the central government to classify the disaster as severe nature to unlock funds. Rehabilitation housing projects are underway in collaboration with the state government.

evidence.title: Wayanad MP Priyanka Gandhi urges Centre to declare Wayanad landslides as disaster of severe nature
evidence.summary: Covers the MP's letters and representations to the Prime Minister requesting comprehensive grant allocations and rehabilitation packages for landslide survivors.

promises.promise_text: Upgrade infrastructure, specialty departments, and trauma care facilities at the Wayanad Government Medical College in Mananthavady.
promises.impact_summary: Since winning the bypoll, she has inspected the facility and raised the issue of inadequate critical care equipment. State and local funds are being aligned to establish a modern trauma ward.

evidence.title: Priyanka Gandhi visits Wayanad Medical College, promises to resolve infrastructure gaps
evidence.summary: Reports on Priyanka Gandhi's physical audit of the medical college and her pledge to lobby both state and union health ministries for urgent infrastructure upgrades.

promises.promise_text: Advocate for sustainable safety measures, elephant corridors, smart fencing, and fair victim compensation to resolve the human-animal conflict in Wayanad.
promises.impact_summary: She has met with forest department officials and affected farmer unions. Pressure has been maintained on the state forest ministry to deploy advanced animal tracking and rapid response units.

evidence.title: Priyanka Gandhi Vadra meets families of human-wildlife conflict victims in Wayanad
evidence.summary: Details the candidate's meetings with families affected by elephant attacks and her promise to secure better tracking systems and higher compensation.

promises.promise_text: Ensure swift clearance and completion of the eco-friendly Anakkampoyil-Meppadi twin-tube tunnel project to establish all-weather connectivity to Wayanad.
promises.impact_summary: The project's execution is active but experienced geological reviews following landslides in mid-2026. The MP has called for balancing ecological safety with infrastructure delivery.

evidence.title: Twin-tube tunnel project progress and ecological safety reviews under scrutiny
evidence.summary: Outlines the construction status of the twin-tube tunnel and political debates on its safety parameters.

promises.promise_text: Revitalize Wayanad's agriculture by lobbying for stable pricing, crop insurance, and research support for coffee and spice growers.
promises.impact_summary: She visited the Regional Coffee Research Station and has raised concerns in Parliament regarding import duties and the need for direct subsidies for high hill coffee growers.

evidence.title: Congress leader Priyanka Gandhi meets coffee growers at research station in Wayanad
evidence.summary: Covers her campaign visit to the coffee research facility where she promised legislative intervention to safeguard local farm incomes.

promises.promise_text: Push for the clearance and development of the Nilambur-Nanjangud railway project to connect Wayanad with major cities in Karnataka and Kerala.
promises.impact_summary: While she pledged to prioritize this, the project remains stalled due to interstate disputes and environmental concerns within Karnataka's forests. Active lobbying with Karnataka counterparts has yielded minimal progress as of 2026.

evidence.title: Interstate railway project Nilambur-Nanjangud faces forest department pushback
evidence.summary: Details the environmental bottlenecks in Bandipur and interstate disagreement preventing progress on the proposed railway line.

promises.promise_text: Expedite the repair and redevelopment of dilapidated cessed buildings in South Mumbai by implementing the amended MHADA Act (1976).
promises.impact_summary: Sawant's parliamentary lobbying helped secure presidential assent for the MHADA amendments. MHADA has started identifying stalled buildings to take over redevelopment, though progress on the ground remains slow.

evidence.title: President gives nod to MHADA Act amendment; paved way for redevelopment of cessed buildings in Mumbai
evidence.summary: Reports on the legislative milestone enabling MHADA to take over stalled private redevelopment projects of dangerous cessed buildings, a key demand of MP Sawant.

promises.promise_text: Ensure rehabilitation of workers and slum residents living on Mumbai Port Authority lands and advocate for utilizing vacant port lands for open green spaces rather than commercial exploitation.
promises.impact_summary: Sawant has consistently raised questions in the Lok Sabha demanding clarification on the MbPA's masterplan, asking for slum rehabilitation policies to apply to central port lands.

evidence.title: Lok Sabha: Question raised by Arvind Sawant regarding encroachment on MPT lands and rehabilitation schemes
evidence.summary: Official Lok Sabha record containing Sawant's queries to the Minister of Ports, Shipping and Waterways regarding rehabilitation policies for port land dwellers.

promises.promise_text: Force the Life Insurance Corporation of India (LIC) to carry out urgent structural repairs or sanction redevelopment of its century-old dilapidated chawls in South Mumbai.
promises.impact_summary: Sawant raised the issue in Parliament, securing commitments that LIC would conduct safety audits of its properties. Some repairs have been initiated, but full redevelopment guidelines are still under negotiation.

evidence.title: Dilapidated LIC buildings in Mumbai: Lok Sabha Written Q&A by MP Arvind Sawant
evidence.summary: Written reply detailing the count, age, and maintenance plan of LIC-owned properties in Mumbai South following queries by Sawant.

promises.promise_text: Ensure fair, high-quality, and timely rehabilitation of tenants in the Worli and Naigaum BDD Chawls redevelopment project.
promises.impact_summary: Construction of the rehabilitation towers is in an advanced stage as of 2026. The MP's office continues to monitor transit accommodation quality and resolve disputes between MHADA, contractors, and tenant associations.

evidence.title: BDD Chawl redevelopment: Worli rehabilitation towers construction enters final phases
evidence.summary: Covers progress updates on the Worli BDD chawls project, the largest urban renewal scheme in South Mumbai, monitored closely by local representatives.

promises.promise_text: Safeguard the traditional fishing rights and navigate channels of the Koli community from threats posed by coastal reclamation and bridge projects.
promises.impact_summary: Sawant helped broker talks between Koli associations and BMC engineers, resulting in wider navigation spans under the coastal road connector and the disbursement of a partial compensation package for affected fishermen in 2025.

evidence.title: Mumbai Coastal Road: Fishermen to get compensation after intense dialogue mediated by local leaders
evidence.summary: Details the compensation guidelines approved for South Mumbai fisherfolk whose livelihoods were impacted by construction works.

promises.promise_text: Facilitate the timely completion of Mumbai Metro Line 3 (Aqua Line) and ensure the rehabilitation of commercial and residential units displaced by station construction.
promises.impact_summary: Phase 1 of Metro Line 3 is operational, while the South Mumbai corridor (Colaba to BKC) is in its final commissioning phase as of July 2026. Displaced shopkeepers and residents are being relocated to permanent rehab buildings in Kalbadevi and Girgaon.

evidence.title: Mumbai Metro 3: Girgaon-Kalbadevi rehabilitation building construction completed
evidence.summary: Reports on the completion of the in-situ rehabilitation towers built by MMRC for families and businesses displaced by Metro Line 3 stations.

promises.promise_text: Advocate for and establish a U.S. Consulate General in Bengaluru to ease visa processes and support the local IT and business community.
promises.impact_summary: The U.S. Consulate General in Bengaluru officially opened at a temporary location at the JW Marriott Hotel on January 17, 2025, fulfilling a major campaign commitment.

evidence.title: US opens consulate in Bengaluru, but visa services will commence later
evidence.summary: Reports the official opening of the U.S. Consulate General in Bengaluru on January 17, 2025, from its temporary location.

promises.promise_text: Secure Union Cabinet approval for Namma Metro Phase 3 project to extend metro connectivity in South Bengaluru.
promises.impact_summary: The Union Cabinet approved Bengaluru Metro Phase 3 on August 16, 2024, representing 44.65 km of new lines including the Outer Ring Road corridor.

evidence.title: Cabinet approves Bengaluru Metro Rail Project Phase-3
evidence.summary: Official Press Information Bureau release announcing the Union Cabinet's approval of the Namma Metro Phase 3 project at a cost of Rs 15,611 crore.

promises.promise_text: Expedite the implementation of the Bengaluru Suburban Rail Project to ease road traffic congestion.
promises.impact_summary: Work on Corridor-2 (Mallige Line) and Corridor-4 (Kanaka Line) is currently underway, though issues in land acquisition and state-rail coordination have caused slight delays.

evidence.title: Bengaluru Suburban Rail Project status update
evidence.summary: Written answer in Lok Sabha detailing funding releases and construction progress of different corridors of the Bengaluru Suburban Rail Project.

promises.promise_text: Ensure full recovery and payout of deposits for all victims of the Sri Guru Raghavendra Sahakara Bank scam.
promises.impact_summary: Over 85% of depositors with savings up to ₹5 lakh have received payouts via DICGC. Recovery of larger deposits remains pending through court-appointed liquidator actions and asset disposal.

evidence.title: Raghavendra bank scam depositors seek speedy liquidation
evidence.summary: News article describing depositors confronting representatives about the recovery of amounts exceeding the ₹5 lakh insurance limit.

promises.promise_text: Empower BMLTA as a single nodal mobility agency to coordinate all public transport and traffic planning in Bengaluru.
promises.impact_summary: While BMLTA was established by legislation, the delegation of operational powers and single-ticketing integrations from BMTC, BMRCL, and K-RIDE are still in early stages.

evidence.title: BMLTA holds coordination meetings with transport operators
evidence.summary: Report on BMLTA drafting a unified mobility plan and working towards integration of local transit services.

promises.promise_text: Set up and expand the network of Pradhan Mantri Bhartiya Janaushadhi Kendras in Bangalore South to provide cheap medicines.
promises.impact_summary: Over 25 new Janaushadhi centers have been opened across the constituency, providing access to generic medicines at low costs.

evidence.title: Generic medicine store list in Bengaluru South
evidence.publisher: Pharmaceuticals & Medical Devices Bureau of India
evidence.summary: Official portal listing active PM Janaushadhi Kendras by state and district.

promises.promise_text: Host regular local job fairs to bridge the gap between job seekers and employers in Bangalore South.
promises.impact_summary: Hosted multiple editions of the Sansad Udyoga Mela, facilitating placements for thousands of local youth in various private companies.

evidence.title: Tejasvi Surya hosts mega job fair in Bangalore South
evidence.summary: A summary page showing the registration count, companies participating, and job offers made during the Sansad job fair.

promises.promise_text: Fast-track central clearances and secure Central funding for Chennai Metro Rail Phase II.
promises.impact_summary: The Union Cabinet approved Chennai Metro Rail Project Phase II as a Central Sector project on October 3, 2024, with a completion cost of ₹63,246 crore.

evidence.title: Union Cabinet approves Chennai Metro Rail Project Phase II
evidence.summary: Official press release detailing the approval of three corridors of Chennai Metro Phase II spanning 118.9 km.

promises.promise_text: Complete the integration of stormwater drain network in flood-prone areas like Vyasarpadi and Otteri to prevent waterlogging.
promises.impact_summary: Major drainage links under the Kosasthalaiyar basin project have been laid by the Greater Chennai Corporation. However, utility shifting and Metro works have delayed full connectivity in some zones.

evidence.title: Greater Chennai Corporation flood mitigation works review
evidence.summary: Reports on Chennai Corporation's progress on storm water drains and inter-departmental coordination.

promises.promise_text: Provide and sustain a monthly basic income of ₹1,000 for women under the state's flagship social welfare scheme.
promises.impact_summary: The scheme is fully operational, with direct benefit transfers of ₹1,000 sent monthly to over 1.15 crore eligible women across Tamil Nadu, including Chennai Central.

evidence.title: Kalaignar Magalir Urimai Scheme Guidelines and Disbursements
evidence.summary: State portal detailing scheme criteria, enrollment statistics, and monthly disbursement reports.

promises.promise_text: Abolish and remove toll booths on national highways near the city to reduce transit costs for residents.
promises.impact_summary: The Tamil Nadu state government has formally petitioned NHAI to close five toll plazas around Chennai. Discussions are ongoing, though tolls remain active in 2026.

evidence.title: State urges NHAI to close toll plazas near Chennai city limits
evidence.summary: Reports state minister's appeal to NHAI citing expired concession periods and urban expansion.

promises.promise_text: Abolish the National Eligibility cum Entrance Test (NEET) in Tamil Nadu to restore state-based medical admissions.
promises.impact_summary: The promise is misleading because the power to abolish NEET rests with the Union government. The state's exemption bills remain pending assent from the President, and NEET continues to be mandatory in 2026.

evidence.title: NEET exemption bill pending before Central authorities
evidence.summary: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare response in Parliament clarifying that there is no proposal to exempt Tamil Nadu from NEET.

promises.promise_text: Waive interest and principal of student education loans from nationalised banks.
promises.impact_summary: No national policy or budget allocation has been approved by the Union government to waive educational loans from commercial banks, as DMK is in opposition at the Centre.

evidence.title: DMK National Election Manifesto 2024 Pledges
evidence.summary: Official party manifesto detailing national pledges including the education loan waiver.

promises.promise_text: Cap retail prices of Petrol at ₹75 per litre, Diesel at ₹65 per litre, and LPG cylinders at ₹500.
promises.impact_summary: Since the DMK/INDIA bloc did not form the Union government, fuel pricing continues under the deregulated oil marketing company structure, and retail rates in Chennai remain above the promised caps in 2026.

evidence.title: Fuel and LPG pricing structures in India
evidence.summary: Database of historical and current retail prices of petroleum products across major cities.

promises.promise_text: Ensure continuation and increased monthly allowances under the state's Lakshmir Bhandar financial assistance scheme.
promises.impact_summary: Monthly payouts were increased to ₹1,000 for general and ₹1,200 for SC/ST women starting April 2024, with direct disbursements reaching millions.

evidence.title: West Bengal budget: Lakshmir Bhandar allowance hiked
evidence.summary: News article covering the state budget announcement and implementation details of the Lakshmir Bhandar hike.

promises.promise_text: Legally and politically oppose the implementation of CAA and NRC in West Bengal.
promises.impact_summary: The state government and party MPs have continuously protested and challenged the CAA rules in court. However, the Central Government began processing CAA applications in 2024.

evidence.title: MHA notifies Citizenship Amendment Rules 2024
evidence.summary: Press release detailing the implementation of the Citizenship Amendment Act rules across India.

promises.promise_text: Construct and upgrade multi-story housing units (pucca flats) for slum dwellers in Kolkata South under the Banglar Bari scheme.
promises.impact_summary: Multiple housing blocks have been completed in Chetla and Kalighat under the KMC's supervision, replacing dilapidated shanties. Work in other wards is ongoing.

evidence.title: Kolkata Municipal Corporation housing initiatives report
evidence.summary: KMC official page outlining housing rehabilitation projects completed and under construction.

promises.promise_text: Improve pipeline capacity and expand water treatment at Garden Reach Water Works to provide safe drinking water to all wards.
promises.impact_summary: State and KMC budget allocations in 2024 and 2025 funded the laying of new distribution lines and booster pumping stations in Kolkata South wards.

evidence.title: KMC budget highlights: focus on drinking water services
evidence.summary: KMC annual budget statement showing capital allocation for water treatment plant expansions.

promises.promise_text: Provide 10 free cooking gas (LPG) cylinders annually to Below Poverty Line (BPL) families.
promises.impact_summary: This was a national campaign promise by the AITC. Since the party is in opposition at the national level and does not control LPG subsidies or supply, the scheme has not been rolled out.

evidence.title: AITC Lok Sabha Manifesto 2024: Didir Shopoth
evidence.summary: Official election manifesto page listing the ten major pledges (Didir Shopoth).

promises.promise_text: Create a price stabilisation fund to cap and control the retail prices of petrol and diesel.
promises.impact_summary: No such fund has been established by the state government or central authorities, and retail fuel rates continue to fluctuate based on market prices.

evidence.title: AITC Lok Sabha Manifesto 2024: Didir Shopoth
evidence.summary: Manifesto details of fuel price stabilization and regulatory measures.

promises.promise_text: Provide free food grains directly to the doorsteps of all ration cardholders.
promises.impact_summary: The state government's Duyare Ration scheme remains active across West Bengal, despite legal challenges in the Supreme Court, ensuring delivery to many households.

evidence.title: West Bengal Food and Supplies Department: Doorstep Ration Delivery status
evidence.publisher: Department of Food & Supplies, Government of West Bengal
evidence.summary: Official dashboard reporting distribution metrics, active dealer counts, and food grain allocations by district.

promises.promise_text: Launch a financial incentive scheme (providing up to ₹1.50 lakh) for the birth, healthcare, and education of girl children.
promises.impact_summary: The Rajasthan government officially launched the Lado Protsahan Yojana on August 1, 2024. As of 2026, it has benefited over 6 lakh girls, with eligibility expanded to private school students.

evidence.title: Lado Protsahan Yojana registration and guidelines
evidence.publisher: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
evidence.summary: National scheme directory outlining benefits, eligibility, and application procedures for the Lado Protsahan Yojana.

promises.promise_text: Provide cooking gas (LPG) cylinders at a subsidized rate of ₹450 to Ujjwala Yojana and BPL beneficiaries.
promises.impact_summary: The scheme was launched on January 1, 2024, by the BJP state government. Beneficiaries receive the subsidy amount via direct benefit transfers.

evidence.title: Rajasthan government starts LPG cylinder subsidy at ₹450
evidence.summary: News report on the launch of the domestic gas cylinder subsidy scheme at ₹450 per cylinder for PMUY/BPL card holders.

promises.promise_text: Fast-track and execute the Eastern Rajasthan Canal Project to ensure drinking water security for Jaipur.
promises.impact_summary: Tripartite agreements were signed in early 2024, and a formal implementation agreement for the Modified PKC-ERCP Link Project was signed in December 2024. DPRs have been submitted for final clearance.

evidence.title: MoU signed for Modified PKC-ERCP Link Project
evidence.summary: Press release on the tripartite MoU signed by the Union Minister of Jal Shakti and Chief Ministers of Rajasthan and Madhya Pradesh.

promises.promise_text: Expand the Jaipur Metro network by constructing Phase 1C (Badi Chaupar to Transport Nagar) and Phase 1D (Mansarovar to Ajmer Road).
promises.impact_summary: Detailed engineering design contracts are complete and civil works are underway. Tracks and electrical tenders were issued in mid-2026 to speed up construction.

evidence.title: Jaipur Metro Phase 1C and 1D construction progress
evidence.summary: JMRC tenders portal showing active bids for track installation, electrical systems, and civil works for Phase 1C and 1D.

promises.promise_text: Establish a comprehensive CCTV surveillance network across major city junctions to ensure public and women's safety.
promises.impact_summary: Under the Smart City and Abhay Command Center projects, several hundred high-resolution cameras have been integrated. Expansion to suburban areas is ongoing.

evidence.title: Rajasthan Police Abhay Command and Control Center report
evidence.summary: Official police department page showcasing integration of city-wide CCTV networks with central command.

promises.promise_text: Provide affordable pucca houses to all urban poor and slum dwellers in Jaipur under PM Awas Yojana.
promises.impact_summary: Over 8,000 houses have been sanctioned in Jaipur under the urban component since 2024. Phased construction and allotment are active.

evidence.title: PM Awas Yojana (Urban) Progress Dashboard
evidence.publisher: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
evidence.summary: National portal reporting state-wise and city-wise housing construction, sanction, and completion statistics.

promises.promise_text: Provide interest-free micro-credit loans up to ₹50,000 and digital training to local street vendors.
promises.impact_summary: Jaipur has seen over 22,000 street vendors receive first-tranche loans (₹10,000) and subsequent disbursements, making it one of the leading cities in Rajasthan for PM SVANidhi.

evidence.title: PM SVANidhi implementation statistics by city
evidence.publisher: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
evidence.summary: Live dashboard tracking applications received, sanctioned, and disbursed loans under PM SVANidhi by municipality.

promises.promise_text: Upgrade the operation of Gujarat Sampark Kranti Express (Train No. 12918) to run on a daily basis.
promises.impact_summary: Demanded formally under Rule 377 in the Lok Sabha in late 2024. Feasibility and path availability are currently under review by the Railway Board as of 2026.

evidence.title: Matters Raised Under Rule 377 - Lok Sabha Debates
evidence.summary: MP Hasmukh Patel submitted a formal request under Rule 377 demanding daily operation of Train No. 12918 to improve Delhi-Ahmedabad connectivity.

promises.promise_text: Construct a pedestrian railway foot overbridge near Kuber Nagar to ensure commuter safety.
promises.impact_summary: Raised by the MP in Parliament. Joint survey by Western Railway and Ahmedabad Municipal Corporation is underway to finalize the structural footprint.

evidence.title: Matters Raised Under Rule 377 - Kuber Nagar FOB Demand
evidence.summary: Submission by MP requesting Western Railway and local authorities to address commuter risk at Kuber Nagar through an FOB.

promises.promise_text: Originate long-distance train services from Asarwa Railway Station instead of Udaipur to benefit local travelers.
promises.impact_summary: Constituency demand highlighted in parliament. In response, Western Railway extended select passenger runs, though main-line adjustments are pending.

evidence.title: Extension of Train Services at Asarwa Station
evidence.summary: Official release details development and gauge conversion works at Asarwa station to accommodate more long-distance originations.

promises.promise_text: Complete Phase 2 of the Kharicut Canal redevelopment, enclosing the canal in RCC boxes and constructing three-lane roads on both sides.
promises.impact_summary: State approved over ₹1,000 crore for Phase 2 in 2025. In mid-2026, the AMC revised road widths to three-lane configurations to accommodate heavy traffic.

evidence.title: Ahmedabad East Infrastructure Development: Kharicut Canal Project Updates
evidence.summary: Gujarat Government approves ₹1,050 crore for Phase 2 of Kharicut Canal stormwater box drainage and corridor development.

promises.promise_text: Upgrade government schools by establishing modern STEM and robotics laboratories using MPLADS funds.
promises.impact_summary: Over 20 schools in Ahmedabad East have successfully setup labs with advanced educational tools using MPLAD allocations.

evidence.title: MPLAD Fund Utilization for Secondary Education in Ahmedabad
evidence.summary: Article details school infrastructure improvements and digital lab development funded through Ahmedabad East MP's local area fund.

promises.promise_text: Provide state-of-the-art diagnostic equipment and upgrade wards at Civil Hospital, Asarwa, using constituency funds.
promises.impact_summary: Upgraded critical ICU and diagnostic wards with advanced machinery, improving tertiary care accessibility for residents in eastern areas.

evidence.title: Health Infrastructure Support to Asarwa Civil Hospital
evidence.summary: Details procurement of medical equipment and ward enhancements in Civil Hospital funded via local MP allocations.

promises.promise_text: Create multiple green 'Oxygen Parks' and conduct large-scale tree plantation drives to improve urban air quality in the constituency.
promises.impact_summary: Successfully created 5 urban mini-forest oxygen parks in industrial zones under the mass greening campaign as of mid-2026.

evidence.title: Mass Afforestation and Eco Parks in Ahmedabad East
evidence.summary: Details the plantation drive and inauguration of a new green zone in Naroda industrial belt in Ahmedabad East.

promises.promise_text: Accelerate and hand over civic housing units under Prime Minister Awas Yojana (PMAY) in eastern urban blocks.
promises.impact_summary: More than 3,500 affordable homes were handed over in early 2025 in events co-attended by the MP. Further housing blocks are under construction.

evidence.title: CM Bhupendra Patel & MP Hasmukh Patel Dedicate Housing Projects
evidence.summary: Inauguration and keys handover for multi-story EWS housing projects in Nikol and Kathwada areas of Ahmedabad East.

promise_vs_execution.methodology_ref: Status-weighted score from v1.1 evidence-linked records

work_vs_impact.methodology_ref: Impact proxy weighted from execution status bands and confidence levels

promises.promise_text: Complete construction of the 63-km Lucknow-Kanpur Expressway to reduce travel time between the cities to under 45 minutes.
promises.impact_summary: Completed and officially inaugurated in July 2026, facilitating faster transit and linking nodes of the Defence Industrial Corridor.

evidence.title: Inauguration of Lucknow-Kanpur Expressway
evidence.publisher: Ministry of Road Transport and Highways
evidence.summary: Union Minister Nitin Gadkari and MP Rajnath Singh inaugurate the access-controlled highway corridor to ease connectivity.

promises.promise_text: Set up and commission India’s largest BrahMos Aerospace integration and manufacturing hub in Lucknow.
promises.impact_summary: Completed. The manufacturing facility has been constructed, commissioned, and successfully rolled out initial batches of missiles.

evidence.title: Defence Industrial Corridor Lucknow Node Operations
evidence.summary: Defence Ministry releases progress report detailing completion and trial runs of the BrahMos facility in Lucknow.

promises.promise_text: Make the entire 104-km Lucknow Outer Ring Road (Kisan Path) operational to divert heavy transit traffic out of the city.
promises.impact_summary: Fully operational. Completed construction and opened the last remaining stretch, significantly reducing traffic jams in core municipal areas.

evidence.title: NHAI Completes Lucknow Outer Ring Road Project
evidence.summary: NHAI details final safety audit and operationalization of Kisan Path bypass ring around Lucknow.

promises.promise_text: Develop the Gomti Riverfront Green Corridor to connect IIM Road with Shaheed Path to ease congestion and create public green spaces.
promises.impact_summary: Phases I and II completed and opened to the public in early 2026. Phase III and IV work is actively ongoing to link Pipraghat and Shaheed Path.

evidence.title: Lucknow Development Authority Green Corridor Phase 2 Completion
evidence.summary: Notification regarding the completion of riverbank landscaping and highway linkages for Phase II of the corridor.

promises.promise_text: Develop a 23-km three-tier elevated corridor connecting Lucknow Airport to Faizabad Road via Shaheed Path.
promises.impact_summary: Announced by MoRTH following requests from the MP. Detailed Project Report (DPR) is currently being finalized by NHAI and LDA.

evidence.title: Three-tier Elevated Corridor DPR Sanctioned for Lucknow
evidence.summary: Union Minister Nitin Gadkari approves DPR preparation for a multilevel rapid transit elevated road system in Lucknow.

promises.promise_text: Extend the Lucknow Metro network along the East-West Corridor connecting Charbagh Railway Station to Vasant Kunj.
promises.impact_summary: Cabinet approval has been granted for the revised DPR. Land pooling and preliminary soil testing have started in old city segments.

evidence.title: Cabinet Approves Lucknow Metro Phase 1B (East-West Corridor)
evidence.summary: Detailed approval for the 11.1 km East-West underground and elevated corridor connecting Charbagh and Vasant Kunj.

promises.promise_text: Redevelop and modernize Lucknow Charbagh Railway Station into a world-class junction under the Amrit Bharat Station Scheme.
promises.impact_summary: Ongoing construction. Work on new air concourses, platforms, and heritage façade preservation is currently about 45% complete.

evidence.title: Redevelopment of Charbagh Railway Station Status
evidence.summary: Written answer in Lok Sabha outlining physical progress and budget expenditures for Lucknow Charbagh redevelopment.

promises.promise_text: Establish the State Capital Region (SCR) surrounding Lucknow to coordinate industrial, urban, and environmental planning.
promises.impact_summary: Completed. The UP State Capital Region Development Authority (SCRDA) Act was passed, creating a unified authority covering Lucknow and five surrounding districts.

evidence.title: UP Government Notifies State Capital Region Authority
evidence.summary: Notification of the constitution of Uttar Pradesh SCRDA to ensure planned peripheral growth around Lucknow.

promise_vs_execution.methodology_ref: Status-weighted score from v1.1 evidence-linked records

work_vs_impact.methodology_ref: Impact proxy weighted from execution status bands and confidence levels

promises.promise_text: Establish a direct metro corridor linking Kalyani Nagar Metro Station to Pune International Airport at Lohegaon.
promises.impact_summary: Detailed plans have been approved by Maha Metro and MoS Civil Aviation. Procurement and alignment surveys are active.

evidence.title: Maha Metro Finalizes Airport Route Alignment
evidence.summary: Report on alignment finalization for the Metro branch extending from Ramwadi line into Lohegaon airport.

promises.promise_text: Acquire 300 acres of land near Lohegaon to facilitate runways and terminal expansion at Pune Airport.
promises.impact_summary: As MoS Civil Aviation, Mohol initiated meetings with the Defence Ministry and state government. Land measurement and compensation packages are under negotiation.

evidence.title: Pune Airport 300-acre Expansion Talks Initiated
evidence.summary: Civil Aviation Ministry press release detailing coordination with local administration to expedite land pooling for runway extension.

promises.promise_text: Approve and initiate execution of the Khadakwasla to Hinjewadi via Swargate Metro corridor.
promises.impact_summary: The DPR was reviewed and forwarded for central cabinet approval by late 2025. Preliminary geotech assessments have begun.

evidence.title: Pune Metro Phase 2 Extension Corridor Status
evidence.summary: Article detailing the submission of new corridors including Swargate-Katraj and Khadakwasla-Hinjewadi links.

promises.promise_text: Construct double-decker flyovers at key junctions like Vanaz-Chandni Chowk and University Road to reduce heavy traffic congestion.
promises.impact_summary: Construction is active on the University Road double-decker flyover (combined metro + vehicle flyover). Work is on track for 2027 completion.

evidence.title: Integrated Flyover Works at University Road Pune
evidence.summary: Local progress report on structural casting of pillars for the integrated multi-level flyover.

promises.promise_text: Clean and rejuvenate the Mula-Mutha River stretches through the construction of Sewage Treatment Plants supported by JICA.
promises.impact_summary: STP construction is underway under the JICA pollution control project. Out of 11 planned STPs, 4 have been commissioned by early 2026.

evidence.title: Mula-Mutha Pollution Control Project STP Progress
evidence.summary: Ministry of Jal Shakti provides written update on STP installation timelines and central funding under National River Conservation Plan.

promises.promise_text: Complete installation of water meters and supply lines to ensure 24x7 equal water distribution across all Pune municipal areas.
promises.impact_summary: PMC has laid about 75% of pipelines and installed over 1.2 lakh meters. Progress continues but completion delayed due to road excavation permissions.

evidence.title: PMC Equal Water Supply Scheme Implementation Status
evidence.summary: Overview of PMC water supply pipeline completion figures and public grid connections.

promises.promise_text: Transition the PMPML public transit fleet by increasing the share of electric buses to 40%.
promises.impact_summary: Currently around 30% of the active PMPML bus fleet consists of electric vehicles. Additional procurement is underway under central schemes.

evidence.title: PMPML EV Fleet Acquisition Program
evidence.summary: Reports that PMC and PCMC have approved funds for procuring 250 new e-buses to meet green transport standards.

promises.promise_text: Fast-track land acquisition and environmental clearances for the Pune Ring Road project to decongest outer suburbs.
promises.impact_summary: Land acquisition is approximately 85% complete for the western phase. MSRDC has invited tenders for construction, with work expected to begin in late 2026.

evidence.title: Land Acquisition Progress on Pune Ring Road Project
evidence.summary: State government reports milestone of 80%+ land acquisition and allocation of infrastructure development funds for Ring Road construction.

promises.promise_text: Ensure the extension and construction of Hyderabad Metro's Green Line from MGBS to Falaknuma in the Old City.
promises.impact_summary: Foundation stone was laid in March 2024 by CM Revanth Reddy in the presence of MP Owaisi. Land acquisition and alignment surveys are in active stages as of mid-2026.

evidence.title: Foundation Laid for Old City Metro Project
evidence.summary: Official press release detailing the route design, station markers, and land pooling approvals for the 5.5 km MGBS-Falaknuma stretch.

promises.promise_text: Construct a 21-storey IT Tower at Malakpet to attract tech firms and generate jobs for youth in the Old City.
promises.impact_summary: Foundation laid in late 2023. Construction was temporarily delayed due to administrative negotiations with bidding contractors; agreements are being renegotiated in 2025-2026.

evidence.title: Malakpet IT Tower Project Construction Tenders
evidence.summary: Local report detailing bid status and pending contractual agreements for the 11-acre IT hub in Hyderabad South.

promises.promise_text: Complete and commission the Bahadurpura flyover to ease congestion near the Nehru Zoological Park.
promises.impact_summary: Successfully completed and opened to the public, significantly reducing congestion at the busy Bahadurpura crossroad.

evidence.title: Inauguration of Bahadurpura Flyover in South Zone
evidence.summary: Describes the inauguration of the 690-meter flyover built under the Strategic Road Development Plan (SRDP) in the presence of MP Asaduddin Owaisi.

promises.promise_text: Expand Basti Dawakhanas (urban primary health clinics) to provide free medical consultations and diagnostics in all poor wards of the Old City.
promises.impact_summary: Successfully completed. Over 40 Basti Dawakhanas are functional across South Hyderabad, providing free primary healthcare services in poor residential blocks.

evidence.title: Expansion of Basti Dawakhanas in South Hyderabad
evidence.summary: Details opening of new local clinics in Yakutpura and Bahadurpura to cater to low-income populations.

promises.promise_text: Support Musi Riverfront cleaning and development while securing proper rehabilitation packages for families displaced from riverbed areas.
promises.impact_summary: The MP supported state plans for Riverfront development, but continuously raised concerns in early 2026 about displacement. The rehabilitation package is being formulated.

evidence.title: AIMIM Demands Just Compensation for Musi Dwellers
evidence.summary: Details representations submitted by Owaisi demanding concrete rehabilitation housing for residents along Musi river banks.

promises.promise_text: Ensure progress on the Charminar Pedestrianization Project to conserve heritage structures and boost local tourism.
promises.impact_summary: Pedestrian paving around Charminar is complete. Buffer zoning and traffic diversion loops are currently being implemented by the GHMC and police.

evidence.title: Charminar Pedestrianization Project Works Status
evidence.summary: Status log of pedestrian pathways and traffic rerouting efforts under the CPP in Old City.

promises.promise_text: Upgrade infrastructure, toilets, and classrooms in all municipal and government schools in Hyderabad Old City under state education schemes.
promises.impact_summary: Fully completed. Over 50 government schools in the Hyderabad constituency have been modernised with clean amenities and digital boards.

evidence.title: School Infrastructure Upgrade under Mana Ooru-Mana Badi in South Zone
evidence.summary: Details digital class setup and washroom construction in government schools within the MP's constituency.

promises.promise_text: Implement the Strategic Nala Development Program (SNDP) to upgrade storm water drains and prevent monsoon flooding in vulnerable low-lying areas.
promises.impact_summary: Major storm water drain widening has been completed in Yakutpura and Bahadurpura. Works in Karwan are still in execution phases as of mid-2026.

evidence.title: SNDP Phase 2 Drainage Upgrades in Hyderabad South
evidence.summary: Status report of nala widening and desiltation operations to prevent urban flooding in low-lying Old City slums.
